raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Context check-in","name":"Before we get into specifics, what feels most worth talking through today?","description":"Lets Kenji set the agenda before the conversation narrows onto any concern.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"landing","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"What changed lately","name":"What's been feeling different in the last few weeks?","description":"Surfaces the shift without presuming whether it is work, team, or role related.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"observation","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Pressure points","name":"What part of the work has been hardest to keep up with?","description":"Finds the concrete friction point in his current workload or pace.","purpose":"topic","stage":"observation","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1}]},{"label":"Pressure source","name":"Where do the shifting requirements make the work hardest to plan?","description":"Gets specific about how changing inputs affect his ability to organize and deliver.","purpose":"topic","stage":"underneath","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Expectation bar","name":"What does doing well in this role look like to you right now?","description":"Checks whether he has a usable internal model of expectations and success.","purpose":"topic","stage":"underneath","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Asking for help","name":"What makes it easiest for you to ask for help here?","description":"Explores how safe and natural support-seeking feels in the team setup.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"underneath","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Support shape","name":"What kind of support from me would actually change the week for you?","description":"Identifies the manager behavior that would be most useful without jumping to fixes.","purpose":"topic","stage":"support","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Protecting time","name":"What are you trying to protect time for right now?","description":"Surfaces his own priorities and what he may be sacrificing to keep up.","purpose":"topic","stage":"underneath","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Role confidence","name":"Where does this role still feel least settled for you?","description":"Checks for the specific part of the job that still feels uncertain or shaky.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"observation","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1}]},{"label":"Next two weeks","name":"What would make the next two weeks steadier for you?","description":"Closes on concrete support and next-step stability without opening new threads.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"support","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]}]}
